summary: Completed comprehensive testing of French real estate CRM application. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), but critical frontend React error preventing CRUD operations.

ui_bugs.issue: React error: SelectItem must have a value prop that is not an empty string
ui_bugs.details: Error prevents form interactions and CRUD operations. Affects client forms, apartment forms, and other select dropdowns.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete client/apartment creation due to SelectItem error

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical React SelectItem error: Ensure all SelectItem components have non-empty value props. Check Clients.js, Appartements.js, and Parametres.js for SelectItem components with empty string values. This error prevents form submissions and CRUD operations.
